metadata.description: AI skills for ecommerce operators. Ad creative, listing optimization, customer ops, and more.

plugins.name: ad-creative-generator
plugins.description: Generate 40+ ad creatives from a single product URL using Gemini API. Produces photorealistic product images, lifestyle shots, and ad variations.

plugins.name: amazon-listing-optimizer
plugins.description: Optimize Amazon product listings for search ranking and conversions. Analyzes titles, bullets, descriptions, and backend keywords.

plugins.name: ecom-review-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze customer reviews to extract insights, identify pain points, find feature requests, and generate improvement recommendations.

plugins.name: email-sequence-builder
plugins.description: Build high-converting email sequences for ecommerce: abandoned cart, post-purchase, win-back, launch, and seasonal campaigns.

plugins.name: social-content-generator
plugins.description: Generate platform-specific social content for ecommerce brands. Creates posts, threads, carousels, and video scripts for X, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn.

plugins.name: competitor-ad-spy
plugins.description: Analyze competitor advertising strategies across Meta, TikTok, and Amazon. Reverse-engineer winning ad patterns, hooks, CTAs, and creative styles into actionable intelligence.

plugins.name: inventory-forecaster
plugins.description: Forecast inventory demand based on sales data, seasonality, and market trends. Generates reorder points, safety stock calculations, and purchase order recommendations.
